_doc: Fall time at V_LOW%-V_HIGH% of the auto-detected envelope of the clipped waveform. Same body as rise_time_auto with thresholds reversed (V_LOW=90, V_HIGH=10) — Maestro's riseTime() interprets reversed thresholds as fall.
name: fall_time_auto
expression: average(riseTime(clip(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG") $T_START $T_END) ymin(clip(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG") $T_START $T_END)) nil ymax(clip(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG") $T_START $T_END)) nil $V_LOW $V_HIGH t "time"))
